prompt: A breathtaking, hyper-realistic landscape of an alpine lake village. In the foreground, a wooden pier with 1 empty bench extends into the crystal-clear blue water from the bottom left, framed by vibrant bright pink and red flowers on the left and tall green reeds on the right. The calm lake perfectly reflects the scenery and features exactly 1 small red rowboat floating on the left and 1 white sailboat on the right. On the right shoreline, a picturesque European village with 1 prominent pointed church spire and traditional houses is nestled at the base of lush green hills. Towering snow-capped jagged peaks dominate the background under a bright sunny day with fluffy white clouds. The lighting is vibrant, idyllic, and highly detailed.
